query:
INSERT INTO site_banners (title, message, type, linkUrl, linkText, isActive) VALUES 
('WINTER WARMTH', 'Cosy layers and winter essentials. Sustainable warmth for the season ahead.', 'promo', '/shop?category=outerwear', 'Shop Winter', false),
('NEW ARRIVALS', 'Fresh finds just added to our collection. Discover your next favourite piece today.', 'info', '/shop', 'Browse New', false),
('SUPPORT CHARITIES', 'Every purchase gives back. 10% of proceeds support local charities and thrift partners.', 'warning', '/charities', 'Learn More', true);
